sections.title: Privacy Policy
sections.content:
This privacy policy outlines how Black Oak Real Estate L.L.C ("BlackOak Real Estate") collects, uses, and protects any information that you provide when using this website.

BlackOak Real Estate is committed to ensuring that your privacy is protected. If we ask you to provide certain information by which you can be identified when using this website, you can be assured that it will only be used in accordance with this privacy policy.

BlackOak Real Estate may update this policy from time to time by revising this page. We encourage you to review this page periodically to ensure you are aware of any changes. This policy is effective from the date it is published on this website.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content:
We may collect the following information:

• Name and job title
• Contact information including email address and phone number
• Demographic information such as postcode, preferences, and interests
• Information submitted through enquiry forms, contact forms, or job applications
• Other information relevant to customer surveys, services, or offers

sections.title: How we use the Information
sections.content:
We collect this information to better understand your needs and provide improved services. In particular, we may use your information for the following purposes:

• Internal record keeping
• Responding to enquiries and providing requested services
• Improving our services, website experience, and offerings
• Sending updates about new properties, services, or company news
• Conducting market research to better understand client needs
• Customizing website content based on user preferences

We may contact you via email, phone, or other communication channels regarding your enquiry or services we provide.

sections.title: Security
sections.content: BlackOak Real Estate is committed to ensuring that your information is secure. To prevent unauthorized access or disclosure, we have implemented appropriate physical, electronic, and managerial procedures to safeguard and secure the information we collect online.
